title: Layout namespace creation + file moves (includes Boxer→Pad rename)
acceptance_criteria: src/Layout/ directory created with all Layout subdirectories
src/Layout/Grid/ subdirectory created with StackedGrid.php, Options.php, ItemOptions.php, ItemWithOptions.php
src/Layout/Tile/ subdirectory created with TileLayout.php, Tile.php, BaseTile.php, Size.php, Constraint.php, Direction.php, Resolver.php
src/Layout/RatioGrid/ subdirectory created with RatioGrid.php, GridItem.php, NewColRow.php
Frame.php moved from Grid/ to Layout/
Boxer.php renamed to Pad.php and moved to Layout/

Layout.php, LayoutItem.php, FlexLayout.php, FlexDirection.php, FlexWrap.php, GridLayout.php, GridItem.php, Stack.php, VStack.php, HStack.php, ZStack.php, Split.php, SplitDirection.php, Panel.php, Sidebar.php, Window.php, Spacer.php, Screen.php, Viewport.php, Center.php, HAlign.php, VAlign.php, AlignItems.php, JustifyContent.php moved to Layout/
FocusManager.php and StackLayout.php created as new files in Layout/
All internal use statements updated (Grid\Foo → Layout\Foo or Layout\Grid\Foo etc.)
All references to Boxer::new() updated to Pad::new() across entire codebase
TD-5 fixed: Replace str_pad byte-counts with Width::string()-aware padder

notes.boxer_rename_critical: Boxer.php → Pad.php is highest risk. Grep for 'Boxer::new()', 'use SugarCraft\Dash\Grid\Boxer', 'Grid\Boxer' across all files first, then replace_all per file. Current Boxer.php is a padding/border wrapper - rename it, then write a new Layout/Boxer/Boxer.php with the real bubbleboxer pattern.
notes.td_fixes: TD-5: str_pad counts bytes not visible columns on ANSI strings. Replace with Width::string()-aware padder.
notes.five_phase_solver: Use 5-phase constraint solver from tealeaves for Tile/Resolver.php instead of tilelayout's buggy int(normalizedWeight) truncation
